creator: littlesandra88@gmail.com
text:
The zfs manpage are missing "hold" and "release" as possible permissions for "zfs allow". See

       zfs allow [-ld] -e perm|@setname[,...] filesystem | volume

   Permissions are generally the ability to use a ZFS
       a ZFS property. The following permissions are available:

Here "hold" and "release" should be listed.
